title: Grasslands 6600
description: Renders dense, animated grass blades that increase immersion and visuals of your world!
body:
# **Grasslands 6600** 

Adds lush, swaying grass blades that grow naturally on top of vanilla grass blocks — no resource packs, no world generation changes!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pCTlbznFiQY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe> 


![Before and after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0b01691d9c2dfc9954479f785ed059d6722919b.jpeg)

![Tall grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ed5e1bded7ed60e834046e7f0b7daf48f359eed_0.webp)


![Config Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a94b0f3dcb86663ec9283570e6b18328b2ca71b.png)


## **Features**
Entity Collision

Regrowth

"R" to mow in 1st person

Dense grass blade clusters rendered directly on grass blocks

Smooth wind animation

Supports most shaders

Fully configurable 

client-side only

### **Now Compatable with Voxy**

Compatible with Distant Horizons

### Requires: Fabric, Fabric API, Cloth Config APT



##
Made by AverageBENNAL
